text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh-heh. Guess what daring mischief Windy
got up to today!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Get this—I took part of the hose Air Groove uses
to water her flowers and painted it just like a
snake!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
The result? Air Groove let out a shriek and tossed
the hose aside, absolutely drenching herself!
Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
...And now I'm playing a game of tag with a very
angry Air Groove. Q-quick, lemme hide in your
office.
